description: An engineer is designing the electrical power system for a new satellite, including solar panels and batteries.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the satellite's power budget, including the power consumption of all subsystems during different operational modes (e.g., day, night, data transmission).

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed power budget.

nodes.task_description: Size the solar arrays to generate enough power to run the satellite and charge the batteries during the sunlit portion of the orbit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the required size and efficiency of the solar panels.

nodes.task_description: Size the batteries to have enough capacity to power the satellite through the longest possible eclipse period with a safe depth of discharge.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the required battery capacity in amp-hours.
